company.name: AutoStream
company.tagline: Automated Video Editing Tools for Content Creators
company.description: AutoStream is a SaaS platform that empowers content creators with AI-powered automated video editing tools. Whether you're a YouTuber, Instagram creator, or TikTok influencer, AutoStream helps you edit faster, smarter, and at scale.

plans.name: Pro Plan
features: Advanced auto-edit with AI scene detection

policies.refund_policy: No refunds are provided after 7 days from the date of purchase. Within 7 days, refund requests are evaluated on a case-by-case basis.

support.basic_plan: Email support only, response within 24-48 hours.
support.pro_plan: 24/7 live support via chat and email.

policies.cancellation: You can cancel your subscription at any time. Access continues until the end of the billing period.
policies.free_trial: AutoStream does not currently offer a free trial, but we do offer a 7-day money-back guarantee on the Basic Plan.

faqs.question: What platforms does AutoStream support?
faqs.answer: AutoStream supports export for YouTube, Instagram Reels, TikTok, Facebook, and Twitter/X. The Pro plan also supports custom resolutions.

faqs.question: Can I upgrade from Basic to Pro?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can upgrade anytime from your dashboard. You'll be charged the prorated difference for the remaining billing cycle.

faqs.question: Does AutoStream support team accounts?
faqs.answer: Team accounts are available on the Pro plan. Contact our sales team for enterprise pricing.

faqs.question: Is there an annual discount?
faqs.answer: Yes! Paying annually saves you 20% — Basic at $23/month and Pro at $63/month when billed yearly.
